github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Generate commit messages using Conventional Commits format:

<type>(<scope>): <subject>

Optional body and footer.

Rules:
- Use one of these types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore
- Scope should describe the part of the code affected (e.g., auth, api, ui)
- Subject must be concise, imperative (e.g., 'add', 'fix', not 'added') and max ~50 chars
- Do NOT capitalize the subject
- Do NOT end subject with a period

Body:
- Optional, add only if needed
- Explain WHY the change was made
- Separate from subject with a blank line

Footer:
- Optional
- Reference issues (e.g., 'Fixes #123')
- Include BREAKING CHANGE: if applicable

Output format strictly:
<type>(<scope>): <subject>

<body>

<footer>
